meaning: 1. machine tool; 2. a lathe; 3. CL:張|张[zhāng]
sentence: 工厂里新引进了几台机床。
pinyin: Gōngchǎng lǐ xīn yǐnjìn le jǐ tái jīchuáng.
english: The factory has newly introduced several machine tools.

meaning: 1. social insurance; 2. abbr. for 社會保險|社会保险
sentence: 公司每月帮员工缴纳社保。
pinyin: Gōngsī měi yuè bāng yuángōng jiǎonà shèbǎo.
english: The company pays social insurance for employees every month.

sentence: 寒潮侵袭了整个北方地区。
pinyin: Háncháo qīnxí le zhěnggè běifāng dìqū.
english: A cold wave assailed the entire northern region.

sentence: 我们两家相邻，来往很方便。
pinyin: Wǒmen liǎng jiā xiānglín, láiwǎng hěn fāngbiàn.
english: Our two families are neighbors, so visiting each other is very convenient.

sentence: 他从小在山村长大。
pinyin: Tā cóngxiǎo zài shāncūn zhǎngdà.
english: He grew up in a mountain village.

meaning: 1. to thwart; 2. to foil (sb's plans); 3. a setback; 4. a failure
sentence: 他的计划被对方挫败了。
pinyin: Tā de jìhuà bèi duìfāng cuòbài le.
english: His plan was foiled by the other side.

sentence: 昨晚的足球赛非常精彩。
pinyin: Zuó wǎn de zúqiúsài fēicháng jīngcǎi.
english: Last night's soccer match was really exciting.

meaning: 1. innate sense of right and wrong; 2. conscience; 3. bosom friend
sentence: 他凭着良知做出了决定。
pinyin: Tā píngzhe liángzhī zuòchū le juédìng.
english: He made the decision based on his conscience.

sentence: 大器晚成，不必心急。
pinyin: Dàqì wǎnchéng, bùbì xīnjí.
english: A great talent takes time to develop — there's no need to be impatient.

sentence: 这套练习题针对性很强。
pinyin: Zhè tào liànxítí zhēnduìxìng hěn qiáng.
english: This set of practice questions is very focused and targeted.

sentence: 他从大学起就开始作曲。
pinyin: Tā cóng dàxué qǐ jiù kāishǐ zuòqǔ.
english: He started composing music since university.

sentence: 他不愿意利用权势谋私利。
pinyin: Tā bù yuànyì lìyòng quánshì móu sīlì.
english: He is unwilling to use his power and influence for personal gain.

meaning: 1. same tone; 2. in agreement with; 3. homology (invariant of a topolo
sentence: 他们在这件事上完全同调。
pinyin: Tāmen zài zhè jiàn shì shàng wánquán tóngdiào.
english: They are completely in agreement on this matter.

meaning: 1. to recover one's sight; 2. (fig.) to recover (lost territories
sentence: 他手术后双眼重光，喜极而泣。
pinyin: Tā shǒushù hòu shuāngyǎn chóngguāng, xǐjí ér qì.
english: After surgery, his sight was restored in both eyes and he wept with joy.

sentence: 这台机器的零部件需要更换了。
pinyin: Zhè tái jīqì de língbùjiàn xūyào gēnghuàn le.
english: The spare parts of this machine need to be replaced.

meaning: 1. to quote; 2. to cite; 3. to recommend (one's friend's, as
sentence: 他在报告中援引了多项研究数据。
pinyin: Tā zài bàogào zhōng yuányǐn le duō xiàng yánjiū shùjù.
english: He cited multiple research data points in the report.

sentence: 隔壁的男孩子特别爱踢足球。
pinyin: Gébì de nánháizi tèbié ài tī zúqiú.
english: The boy next door is especially fond of playing soccer.

sentence: 我们队终于打赢了这场比赛。
pinyin: Wǒmen duì zhōngyú dǎyíng le zhè chǎng bǐsài.
english: Our team finally won the match.

sentence: 那段变乱的岁月里，很多家庭都失散了。
pinyin: Nà duàn biàn luàn de suì yuè lǐ, hěn duō jiā tíng dōu shī sàn le.
english: During that period of turmoil, many families were separated.

meaning: to open one's heart; to have a heart-to-heart conversation
sentence: 和老朋友喝茶聊天，彼此交心，感觉很轻松。
pinyin: Hé lǎo péng yǒu hē chá liáo tiān, bǐ cǐ jiāo xīn, gǎn jué hěn qīng sōng.
english: Having tea and chatting with an old friend and opening our hearts to each other felt very relaxing.

meaning: to be affiliated with; to operate under the wing of; affiliation
sentence: 这家小公司挂靠在一所大学名下经营。
pinyin: Zhè jiā xiǎo gōng sī guà kào zài yī suǒ dà xué míng xià jīng yíng.
english: This small company operates under the affiliation of a university.

meaning: to put together; to add; to merge
sentence: 两个部门归并成了一个，减少了不少麻烦。
pinyin: Liǎng gè bù mén guī bìng chéng le yī gè, jiǎn shǎo le bù shǎo má fán.
english: The two departments were merged into one, cutting out a lot of hassle.

meaning: united front (abbr. for 統一戰線|统一战线[tong3 yi1 zhan4 xian4])
sentence: 统战工作要注重与各方建立信任。
pinyin: Tǒng zhàn gōng zuò yào zhù zhòng yǔ gè fāng jiàn lì xìn rèn.
english: United front work must focus on building trust with all parties.

meaning: to reform; to rectify and improve
sentence: 检查发现问题后，工厂立刻开始整改。
pinyin: Jiǎn chá fā xiàn wèn tí hòu, gōng chǎng lì kè kāi shǐ zhěng gǎi.
english: After the inspection found problems, the factory immediately began rectifying them.

sentence: 评审委员与参赛方有利益冲突，应该回避。
pinyin: Píng shěn wěi yuán yǔ cān sài fāng yǒu lì yì chōng tū, yīng gāi huí bì.
english: The judge has a conflict of interest with one of the contestants and should recuse themselves.

meaning: to lift oneself out of poverty
sentence: 经过多年努力，这个村子终于脱贫了。
pinyin: Jīng guò duō nián nǔ lì, zhè gè cūn zi zhōng yú tuō pín le.
english: After years of hard work, this village has finally lifted itself out of poverty.

meaning: big head; mask in the shape of a big head; the larger end of sth; the
sentence: 这笔开销的大头是租金，其他费用不多。
pinyin: Zhè bǐ kāi xiāo de dà tóu shì zū jīn, qí tā fèi yòng bù duō.
english: The main chunk of this expense is rent; the other costs are small.

sentence: 他出门旅游时喜欢带点肉干当零食。
pinyin: Tā chū mén lǚ yóu shí xǐ huān dài diǎn ròu gān dāng líng shí.
english: When traveling, he likes to bring some dried meat as a snack.

sentence: 这个地区以轻工业为主，主要生产纺织品。
pinyin: Zhè gè dì qū yǐ qīng gōng yè wéi zhǔ, zhǔ yào shēng chǎn fǎng zhī pǐn.
english: This area is dominated by light industry, mainly producing textiles.

sentence: 鱼塘里放了一批新鱼种，等到秋天就能捕了。
pinyin: Yú táng lǐ fàng le yī pī xīn yú zhǒng, děng dào qiū tiān jiù néng bǔ le.
english: A new batch of fingerlings was put in the fish pond; they'll be ready to catch by autumn.

sentence: 媒体的公信力来自持续准确的报道。
pinyin: Méi tǐ de gōng xìn lì lái zì chí xù zhǔn què de bào dào.
english: A media outlet's public credibility comes from consistently accurate reporting.

sentence: 他第一次看马球比赛，觉得非常刺激。
pinyin: Tā dì yī cì kàn mǎ qiú bǐ sài, jué de fēi cháng cì jī.
english: He watched a polo match for the first time and found it very exciting.

sentence: 他开着豪车，看起来像个大款。
pinyin: Tā kāi zhe háo chē, kàn qǐ lái xiàng gè dà kuǎn.
english: He drives a luxury car and looks like a wealthy tycoon.

sentence: 嗓子不舒服要及时去看病。
pinyin: Sǎngzi bù shūfu yào jíshí qù kànbìng.
english: If your throat is bothering you, go see a doctor right away.

meaning: gently caress and stroke; to pet; to fondle
sentence: 她轻轻抚摸着小猫的头。
pinyin: Tā qīngqīng fǔmō zhe xiǎo māo de tóu.
english: She gently stroked the kitten's head.

sentence: 这款面霜能让皮肤保持滋润。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn miànhuāng néng ràng pífū bǎochí zīrùn.
english: This face cream keeps your skin moisturized.

sentence: 天气太炎热，大家都不想出门。
pinyin: Tiānqì tài yánrè, dàjiā dōu bù xiǎng chū mén.
english: The weather is so scorching hot that nobody wants to go out.

sentence: 这个设计思路非常新颖。
pinyin: Zhège shèjì sīlù fēicháng xīnyǐng.
english: This design concept is very original and fresh.

meaning: to precipitate (solid sediment out of a solution); to settle
sentence: 摇一摇瓶子，底部的沉淀就散开了。
pinyin: Yáo yi yáo píng zi, dǐ bù de chén diàn jiù sàn kāi le.
english: Give the bottle a shake and the sediment at the bottom will disperse.

sentence: 连续加班几个月，他感到有些抑郁。
pinyin: Liánxù jiābān jǐ gè yuè, tā gǎndào yǒuxiē yìyù.
english: After months of continuous overtime, he started feeling somewhat depressed.

sentence: 楼下装修的噪声让我没法睡觉。
pinyin: Lóu xià zhuāngxiū de zàoshēng ràng wǒ méifǎ shuìjiào.
english: The renovation noise from downstairs makes it impossible for me to sleep.

meaning: 1. to excise; 2. to cut out (a tumor)
sentence: 医生建议手术切除那颗囊肿。
pinyin: Yīshēng jiànyì shǒushù qiēchú nà kē nángzhǒng.
english: The doctor recommended surgically removing the cyst.

sentence: 自行车的车轮需要充气了。
pinyin: Zì xíng chē de chē lún xū yào chōng qì le.
english: The bicycle wheels need to be inflated.

sentence: 孩子的好奇心很强，什么都想试。
pinyin: Hái zi de hào qí xīn hěn qiáng, shén me dōu xiǎng shì.
english: Children have a strong sense of curiosity and want to try everything.

sentence: 医生说他的肝脏有些问题。
pinyin: Yī shēng shuō tā de gān zàng yǒu xiē wèn tí.
english: The doctor said there are some problems with his liver.

meaning: 1. to shrink (in the wash); 2. fig. to shrink (of profits etc)
sentence: 这件衬衫洗了之后缩水了。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn chèn shān xǐ le zhī hòu suō shuǐ le.
english: This shirt shrank after being washed.

sentence: 这所学校专门招收贫困家庭的子弟。
pinyin: Zhè suǒ xué xiào zhuān mén zhāo shōu pín kùn jiā tíng de zǐ dì.
english: This school specifically enrolls children from impoverished families.

meaning: 1. railtrack connection; 2. to integrate into sth; 3. to dock; 4. to c
sentence: 我们要与国际标准接轨。
pinyin: Wǒmen yào yǔ guójì biāozhǔn jiēguǐ.
english: We need to align with international standards.

meaning: 1. to revise the current edition; 2. revised edition
sentence: 这个网站刚刚改版。
pinyin: Zhège wǎngzhàn gānggāng gǎibǎn.
english: This website just launched a redesign.

sentence: 这个小区每月收取一定的管理费。
pinyin: Zhège xiǎoqū měi yuè shōuqǔ yīdìng de guǎnlǐfèi.
english: This residential community charges a fixed management fee every month.
